nasb.text: The Levite, because he has no portion or inheritance among you, and the alien, the orphan and the widow who are in your town, shall come and eat and be satisfied, in order that the Lord your God may bless you in all the work of your hand which you do.

esv.text: And the Levite, because he has no portion or inheritance with you, and the sojourner, the fatherless, and the widow, who are within your towns, shall come and eat and be filled, that the Lord your God may bless you in all the work of your hands that you do.

cnv.text: 這樣，利未人，以及在你城裡的寄居者和孤兒寡婦，就可以來，吃得飽足；好叫耶和華你的　神在你手所作的一切事上，賜福給你。”

ccb.text: 让你们城中没有土地的利未人、寄居者和孤儿寡妇都可以来吃饱。这样，你们的上帝耶和华必使你们凡事蒙福。
